name: Touch
overview: A romantic comedy about a makeup artist who becomes unemployed with debt and an idol trainee who failed to debut after training for 10 years. When the two meet, they begin to chase after their dreams once again and fall in love with each other.

trailers.title: [티저] 누구든 내 터치 한번으로 다시 태어나리라! | 채널A 신규드라마 터치 1월 3일 첫방송
